signals.headline: Russia-Ukraine Easter Ceasefire Ended with Mutual Violations | NO | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Russia-Ukraine Easter Ceasefire Ended with Mutual Violations | NO | HIGH confidence**

Russia and Ukraine agreed to a 32-hour unilateral Easter ceasefire announced by Putin on April 9-10, 2026, effective from 4 PM April 11 to end of April 12, following Ukraine's prior proposal which Russia initially dismissed[1][2][3].
